message:
Migrate from recharts to echarts-for-react -- fixes React 19 infinite re-render loops

recharts' internal useSyncExternalStore causes infinite re-render loops
with React 19, breaking card rendering and blocking React Router navigation.

Migrated all 20 files using recharts to echarts-for-react:
- 6 shared chart components (BarChart, PieChart, TimeSeriesChart, Sparkline, TreeMap, RadarChart)
- 7 card-specific charts (EventsTimeline, PodHealthTrend, ResourceTrend, GPUUsageTrend, GPUUtilization, GPUInventoryHistory)
- 4 insight cards (CrossClusterEventCorrelation, DeploymentRolloutTracker, ResourceImbalanceDetector, ClusterDeltaDetector)
- 3 llm-d benchmark cards (LatencyBreakdown, ThroughputComparison, ResourceUtilization)
- ChartVisualization unified card system

All shared chart components maintain the same props interface so callers
are unaffected. Removed recharts dependency and its console.warn suppressor.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
